2026-03-10T10:34:15.1249768Z The GitHub issue has been created. Here's a summary of what was found:
2026-03-10T10:34:15.1250308Z 
2026-03-10T10:34:15.1250439Z ## Analysis Summary
2026-03-10T10:34:15.1250647Z 
2026-03-10T10:34:16.0715811Z **7 packages with failing CI** on `main` at commit `734bf6b96b` (2026-03-10):
2026-03-10T10:34:16.0716694Z 
2026-03-10T10:34:16.0720773Z ### 🔴 Code Bug — Actionable Fix Required
2026-03-10T10:34:17.4588746Z **`@azure-rest/ai-document-intelligence`** — **126 playback test failures (93%)**
2026-03-10T10:34:20.3625546Z - **Root cause:** `test/utils/constants.ts` has `ENDPOINT = "https://endpoint/"` (trailing slash). The client factory in `src/documentIntelligence.ts` appends `/documentintelligence`, producing `https://endpoint//documentintelligence` (double slash). Recordings store single-slash URLs → all playback tests fail with "Uri doesn't match".
2026-03-10T10:34:20.3818436Z - **Fix:** Either remove the trailing slash from the constant (`"https://endpoint"`) or defensively strip it in the source: `endpointParam.replace(/\/$/, "")`.
2026-03-10T10:34:20.3819361Z 
2026-03-10T10:34:21.4547346Z ### 🟡 Live Service / Environment Issues (no code fix needed)
2026-03-10T10:34:21.4548585Z | Package | Error | Type |
2026-03-10T10:34:21.4549090Z |---------|-------|------|
2026-03-10T10:34:21.4735675Z | `@azure/attestation` | VBS attestation policy not set | Service configuration |
2026-03-10T10:34:27.3198957Z | `@azure/digital-twins-core` | `$(PackagePath)` variable unresolved | CI pipeline infra |
2026-03-10T10:34:27.3200257Z | `@azure/storage-blob` | Public access not permitted | Storage account config |
2026-03-10T10:34:27.3210624Z | `@azure/storage-file-share` | Structured Message not valid | Transient service error |

2026-03-10T10:34:27.3258576Z | `@azure/communication-short-codes` | Server internal error (HTTP 500) | Transient service error |

2026-03-10T10:34:42.3570753Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-03-10T10:34:42.3571037Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-03-10T10:34:42.3571197Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-03-10T10:34:42.3571416Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-03-10T10:34:42.3571767Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-03-10T10:34:42.3571884Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-03-10T10:34:42.3572030Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-03-10T10:34:42.3572115Z [36;1melse[0m
